_meta.note: ISIN -> partial LookthroughProfile overrides applied on top of the curated PROFILES in src/lib/lookthrough.ts. Populated monthly (1st of month, 04:00 UTC) by the refresh-lookthrough GitHub Action. Refreshed fields: topHoldings (top-10 stocks, per-ISIN topHoldingsAsOf stamp), geo / sector breakdown maps (per-ISIN breakdownsAsOf stamp, scraped from justETF — static profile HTML when complete, Wicket Ajax loadMore endpoint with a session cookie when justETF renders a 'Show more' link), and currency (re-bucketed from the just-refreshed geo map via a country -> local-listing-currency table — justETF doesn't publish a per-ETF currency breakdown directly; skipped for currency-hedged share classes whose curated hedge-currency map remains authoritative).
